title: Antispam
description: This plguin prevents identical messages being sent, repeated characters, and caps lock!
body:
Antispam prevents players from spamming on your server. This specific plugin includes the following ways of preventing spam:

Identical messages - Players cannot send identical messages
Character spam - Players cannot send more than 3 identical characters in a row
Caps lock - Players cannot send more than 5 uppercase letters per message or 40% uppercase letters

For the identical messages, only their last 5 messages are stored, this means after a player sends 5 nonidentical messages, they may repeat what they had said 5 messages ago.
